seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO X7 Pro, Dimensity 8400-Ultra, AMOLED display, 50MP OIS camera, 6000mAh battery, 90W HyperCharge, IP68, HyperOS 2, LPDDR5X, UFS 4.0, LiquidCool Technology 4.0, Gorilla Glass 7i, Dual SIM, 5G
seo_data.meta_title: POCO X7 Pro - Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra Smartphone
seo_data.meta_description: Experience full speed ahead with POCO X7 Pro. Featuring Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED, 50MP OIS camera, 6000mAh battery with 90W HyperCharge, and IP68 resistance.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO X7 Pro redefines speed and performance, powered by the flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra chipset built on TSMC's advanced 4nm process technology. This device boasts a world-first ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture with an All-Big-Core design, delivering superior gaming and multitasking capabilities with an AnTuTu score of 1,704,330. Enhanced by WildBoost Optimization 3.0 and the POCO 3D IceLoop cooling system, it ensures stable frame rates, improved graphics, and optimal thermal management even during intense use. With LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, the POCO X7 Pro offers smooth and reliable performance for demanding users.

Visuals come alive on the 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, featuring an ultra-slim bezel, 3200 nits peak brightness, Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i protection. Photography is handled by a 50MP main camera with OIS, complemented by an 8MP ultrawide lens and a 20MP front camera, capable of 4K video recording. The device is built for durability with IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance and is equipped with a robust 6000mAh (typ) battery supporting 90W HyperCharge, achieving 100% charge in just 42 minutes. Running on Android 15 with Xiaomi HyperOS 2, the POCO X7 Pro offers a comprehensive and secure user experience.

range_overview:
The POCO X7 Pro stands as a flagship smartphone engineered for peak performance and an immersive user experience. At its core lies the Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor, fabricated using a 4nm process, featuring an Octa-core CPU with Cortex-A725 architecture and a Mali-G720 MC7 GPU. This powerful combination delivers exceptional speed, evidenced by an AnTuTu score of 1,704,330, alongside significant improvements in CPU, GPU, and NPU performance and power efficiency compared to previous generations. The device integrates WildBoost Optimization 3.0 for enhanced gaming and the POCO 3D IceLoop system, a sophisticated liquid cooling technology with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump, ensuring optimal temperatures and sustained performance during extended use.

Visuals are a highlight on the 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K AMOLED display, offering a 120Hz refresh rate, 1920Hz PWM dimming, and a stunning peak brightness of 3200 nits. It supports Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and is protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 7i, providing a vibrant and durable viewing experience. For photography, the POCO X7 Pro features a versatile camera system, including a 50MP main camera with OIS, an 8MP ultrawide camera, and a 20MP front camera, capable of recording 4K video at up to 60fps. Powering this device is a substantial 6000mAh (typical) battery, supported by 90W HyperCharge technology that can fully charge the phone in just 42 minutes. The POCO X7 Pro also boasts IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance, ensuring robust protection against environmental elements. It runs on Android 15 with Xiaomi HyperOS 2, offering a modern and efficient operating system.
sales_arguments: Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra for superior gaming and multitasking performance.
6000mAh (typ) battery with 90W HyperCharge, reaching 100% in just 42 minutes.
CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with 3200 nits peak brightness and Dolby Vision for stunning visuals.
50MP main camera with OIS and 4K video recording for professional-grade photography and videography.
IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance combined with Corning Gorilla Glass 7i for enhanced durability and protection.

technical_specifications.CPU: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)
technical_specifications.Display Type: AMOLED, 68B colors, 120Hz, 1920Hz PWM, Dolby Vision, HDR10+, 1400 nits (HBM), 3200 nits (peak)
technical_specifications.Build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), plastic back, silicone polymer back (eco leather)
technical_specifications.Water & Dust Resistance: IP68/IP69 dust tight and water resistant (high pressure water jets; immersible up to 1.5m for 30 min)
technical_specifications.Sensors: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass
technical_specifications.Audio: Dual speakers, Dolby Atmos, 24-bit/192kHz Hi-Res & Hi-Res Wireless audio
technical_specifications.Colors: Black/Yellow, White, Green, Red (Iron Man Edition)
